hooks.command: RECAP_FILE="docs/context/$(date +%Y-%m-%d).md"; if [ -f "$RECAP_FILE" ]; then MOD=$(stat -c %Y "$RECAP_FILE" 2>/dev/null || stat -f %m "$RECAP_FILE" 2>/dev/null || echo 0); NOW=$(date +%s); DIFF=$((NOW - MOD)); if [ "$DIFF" -lt 180 ]; then exit 0; fi; fi; PROJECT_NAME=$(basename "$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || pwd)"); PENDING_LOG="$HOME/.claude/recap/pending.log"; mkdir -p "$HOME/.claude/recap"; echo "PENDING:$(date +%s):$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || pwd)" >> "$PENDING_LOG"; echo "[auto-recap] SILENT MODE: Do NOT output any text to the user. Perform all actions silently without any status messages, explanations, or confirmations. Just execute: review the conversation, run git status --short, then write to docs/context/ using the recap skill format. After writing, update docs/context/META.json, ~/.claude/recap/projects/${PROJECT_NAME}.json, and docs/context/DECISIONS.md (if key decisions exist). Then run: git add docs/context/ && git commit -m 'recap: $(date +%Y-%m-%d) session summary'. Do not print anything to the user."

if [ -d docs/context ]; then ACTIVITY_LOG="docs/context/.agent-activity.jsonl"; echo "{\"ts\":\"$(date -Iseconds)\",\"agent\":\"${CLAUDE_AGENT_DESCRIPTION:-unknown}\",\"action\":\"completed\"}" >> "$ACTIVITY_LOG"; echo "[recap] Sub-agent '${CLAUDE_AGENT_DESCRIPTION:-unknown}' completed. Activity logged."; fi

MARKER="/tmp/recap_session_$(date +%Y%m%d)"; if [ -f "$MARKER" ]; then exit 0; fi; touch "$MARKER"; PENDING_LOG="$HOME/.claude/recap/pending.log"; if [ -f "$PENDING_LOG" ]; then CURRENT_PATH=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || pwd); PENDING=$(grep "$CURRENT_PATH" "$PENDING_LOG" 2>/dev/null | tail -1); if [ -n "$PENDING" ]; then PENDING_TS=$(echo "$PENDING" | cut -d: -f2); PENDING_DAY=$(date -d @$PENDING_TS '+%Y-%m-%d' 2>/dev/null || date -r $PENDING_TS '+%Y-%m-%d' 2>/dev/null || echo ''); if [ -n "$PENDING_DAY" ] && [ ! -f "docs/context/${PENDING_DAY}.md" ]; then echo "[recap-recovery] Previous session on ${PENDING_DAY} ended without a successful recap. Please generate a recovery recap based on git log --since=${PENDING_DAY}."; fi; grep -v "$CURRENT_PATH" "$PENDING_LOG" > "${PENDING_LOG}.tmp" 2>/dev/null; mv "${PENDING_LOG}.tmp" "$PENDING_LOG" 2>/dev/null; fi; fi; if [ -f "docs/context/META.json" ]; then echo "[recap-context] Project snapshot:"; cat docs/context/META.json; fi; if [ -f "docs/context/PROGRESS.md" ]; then echo "[recap-context] Current progress:"; sed -n '/## Current Focus/,/^## /p' docs/context/PROGRESS.md 2>/dev/null | head -10; sed -n '/## 当前焦点/,/^## /p' docs/context/PROGRESS.md 2>/dev/null | head -10; sed -n '/## Next Steps/,/^## /p' docs/context/PROGRESS.md 2>/dev/null | head -10; sed -n '/## 后续步骤/,/^## /p' docs/context/PROGRESS.md 2>/dev/null | head -10; fi; LATEST=$(ls -1 docs/context/????-??-??.md 2>/dev/null | sort -r | head -1); if [ -n "$LATEST" ]; then ISSUES=$(grep -A 10 -E '### (Remaining Issues|遗留问题)' "$LATEST" 2>/dev/null | grep '^- ' | head -5); if [ -n "$ISSUES" ]; then echo "[recap] Previous session ($(basename $LATEST .md)) remaining issues:"; echo "$ISSUES"; fi; fi; CURRENT_PROJECT=$(basename "$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || pwd)"); GLOBAL_DIR="$HOME/.claude/recap/projects"; if [ -d "$GLOBAL_DIR" ]; then NOW=$(date +%s); CUTOFF=$((NOW - 86400)); COUNT=0; for f in "$GLOBAL_DIR"/*.json; do [ ! -f "$f" ] && continue; NAME=$(basename "$f" .json); [ "$NAME" = "$CURRENT_PROJECT" ] && continue; MOD=$(stat -c %Y "$f" 2>/dev/null || stat -f %m "$f" 2>/dev/null || echo 0); if [ "$MOD" -gt "$CUTOFF" ] && [ "$COUNT" -lt 3 ]; then PROJ_ISSUES=$(grep -o '"remainingIssues":\[.*\]' "$f" 2>/dev/null | head -1); if echo "$PROJ_ISSUES" | grep -q '"[^"]*"'; then echo "[recap] Active project '$NAME' has open issues (last active: $(date -d @$MOD '+%m-%d %H:%M' 2>/dev/null || date -r $MOD '+%m-%d %H:%M' 2>/dev/null || echo 'recently'))"; COUNT=$((COUNT + 1)); fi; fi; done; fi
